subject: just a few hours left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
Can you chip in before the polls close today? |
---
|

| Team,

We wanted to make sure you saw Kyrsten's message from this morning. Polls are only open for a few more hours in Arizona.

[_**Can you make a last-minute $10 contribution before the polls close so we have what we need to win?**_](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-primary?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+make+a+lastminute+ask+contributi&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180828_3_ADD&source=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180828_3_ADD")

**[Donate: $10](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-primary?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=2+-++if+consfirstname+++consfirstname++upper&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180828_3_ADD&source=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180828_3_ADD")**
Thanks so much. Let's go win this thing.
\- Team Sinema

\-- Begin Forwarded Message: --

Team -

Today, Arizonans will go to the polls for our primary election.
[**Can you make a last-minute contribution to make sure we have what we need to win?**](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-primary?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=3+-+Can+you+make+a+lastminute+contribution+t&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180828_3_ADD&source=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180828_3_ADD")

In the 11 months since we launched this campaign, we've traveled the state and heard from Arizonans about the issues that matter most -- priorities like protecting health care, standing up for seniors, and taking care of our veterans.

To everyone who has volunteered, donated, and shared this campaign's message with your friends and neighbors so far, thank you. I am so grateful for your support.

Today I'm ready take a major step forward in the fight for our shared values, and I need to know you're with me for the long haul.

If you haven't contributed to our campaign yet, there's never been a better time to make your first contribution -- **[can you chip in just $10 now to show you're with me in this fight?](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-primary?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=5+-+can+you+chip+in+just+ask+now+to+show+you&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180828_3_ADD&source=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180828_3_ADD")**

I'm ready for the home stretch. I'm ready to cut through the dysfunction in Washington and get things done for everyday Arizonans as your Senator. But I need you with me to make that happen.

Chip in today to help us take the next big step toward victory in our campaign for everyday Arizonans: [**http://act.kyrstensinema.com/primary**](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-primary?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=6+-+httpactkyrstensinemacomprimary&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180828_3_ADD&source=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180828_3_ADD")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page._

**[Donate $10 now](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-primary?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&express_lane=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=7+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180828_3_ADD&source=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180828_3_ADD")**

Kyrsten

**[Contribute->](http://act.kyrstensinema. Kyrsten is running for the United States Senate because she wants to help Arizonans get their shot at the American dream. She's spent her career fighting for veterans and military families, listening to the middle class, and doing her part to fix a broken Washington.

She can't win this race without support from people like you. You can donate to Sinema for Arizona by clicking [here](http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/m/595d0219/45aebd3c/490c63ae/2ca858a8/2331549134/VEsHAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&amount=10&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=16+-+here&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180828_3_ADD&source=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180828_3_ADD"). name: betofortexas.com
subject: A pro-Cruz super PAC just announced plans for a 7-figure ad buy against Beto. Can you open this email and donate to help Beto fight back?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Ted Cruz’s biggest super PAC donors never thought there’d be a real
challenge in Texas. They underestimated us for a long time, but now we
have them running scared.

Club For Growth, a pro-Cruz super PAC that spent more than $5.5 million on
his 2012 campaign, just announced a major 7-figure ad buy. We don’t know
how much exactly yet, but anything with seven digits is sure to be a huge
hit.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/6414?refcode=em20180828&t=1019&akid=5740%2E444211%2EPG5wyT ]Rush a
$3
donation right now to help Beto fight back. Every dollar donated helps
counter what’s sure to be a barrage in anti-Beto TV ads.

There’s never been a
better time to make your first contribution to Beto’s campaign. We set a
goal of raising $500,000 online in the next couple of days before the end
of the month so we can keep competing with this deluge of pro-Cruz
spending.

Thank you for helping us get there today -- support from donors like you
is why we’re able to run this historic campaign without taking a dime from
PACs or special interests.

Team Beto

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/6414?refcode=em20180828&t=1020&akid=5740%2E444211%2EPG5wyT ]Contribute
$3
»

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20180829footer&t=1021&akid=5740%2E444211%2EPG5wyT

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=5740%2E444211%2EPG5wyT

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

subject: Only 70 days left to keep Trump in check
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
The final countdown to Election Day has officially begun. We have 70 days left to take back the House. We need to fight every single day to elect a Democratic majority in the House.
|
---
| | The final countdown to Election Day has officially begun. We have 70 days left to take back the House. We need to fight every single day to elect a Democratic majority in the House. **Winning back the House isn 't just about having a majority. It is about keeping Donald Trump in check. ** [**We are relying on your grassroots support. Can you donate $7 or $17 today?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f4e/622b7b5b/1c899366/307b912a/2310135653/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180828?refcode=dwse180828_m&recurring=true&amount=5") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $7](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f4e/622b7b5b/1c899366/307b912d/2310135653/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwODI4IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180828?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=dwse180828_m_7&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $17](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f4e/622b7b5b/1c899366/307b912d/2310135653/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwODI4IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjE3IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180828?express_lane=true&amount=17&refcode=dwse180828_m_17&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $25](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f4e/622b7b5b/1c899366/307b912d/2310135653/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwODI4IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180828?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=dwse180828_m_25&refcode2=861769")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f4e/622b7b5b/1c899366/307b912c/2310135653/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwODI4IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180828?refcode=dwse180828_m_other&refcode2=861769")** I could write paragraphs about why this is so important. But you and I both know this is the only way to protect health care access, Planned Parenthood, Medicare, Social Security and our values. So, I have a question for you. **Are you willing to step up and make a contribution or are you going to sit back and let Donald Trump run wild with his detrimental policies?** [**I am asking you to step up today. A few dollars goes a long way.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f4e/622b7b5b/1c899366/307b912a/2310135653/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180828?refcode=dwse180828_m&recurring=true&amount=5") You can use this secure link to give: [**www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/Seventy**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f4e/622b7b5b/1c899366/307b912a/2310135653/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180828?refcode=dwse180828_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thanks! Debbie Sent from my iPad. Sorry for any typos.
---

|
---

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Gillum VICTORY in Florida
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
YOU MADE HISTORY! Andrew Gillum just won a nailbiter, five-way race
#
Friends,
**YOU MADE HISTORY!** Andrew Gillum just won a nailbiter, five-way race against candidates backed by corporate interests, to take on President Trump's endorsed nominee in November. Gillum's people-powered campaign is Florida's best shot in two decades to flip Florida blue.
[**This is against ALL the odds, and it's proof that _big organizing beats big money in politics._ That's what we need for November. Pitch in $5 to help Andrew Gillum's campaign and Our Revolution win this election.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a945/bed43eb/79565136/75fc9e6a/1912851236/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-gillum?refcode=em180828")
Florida has proved that this is no ordinary campaign. We have a true progressive on the ballot, the first black major party nominee for governor in state history, and he is counting on our support. That is why Senator Bernie Sanders, local groups, and Gillum's grassroots army got out the vote to put him over the top in this primary.
When Florida voters went to the polls tonight in record numbers, they didn't just vote for Andrew Gillum, they voted for Medicare for All, a $15 minimum wage, public education, criminal justice reform, the environment, and making Florida a state where everyone thrives. They voted for a political revolution--our revolution.
[**When people vote, we win. Pitch in $5 right now to help Our Revolution elect Andrew Gillum the next Governor of Florida.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a945/bed43eb/79565136/75fc9e6a/1912851236/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-gillum?refcode=em180828")
Let's keep making history.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a945/bed43eb/79565136/75fc9e6a/1912851236/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-gillum?refcode=em180828")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a945/bed43eb/79565136/75fc9e94/1912851236/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a945/bed43eb/79565136/75fc9e97/1912851236/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a945/bed43eb/79565136/75fc9e96/1912851236/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

body:
Tom is serious when he says that things are about to escalate, quickly, in this race.
Hey there, _did you see Tom 's message below?_ It's PRIMARY DAY here in Arizona -- which means we are very close to learning who we're up against in November. And Tom needs [**YOUR SUPPORT**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.28_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") to make sure we hit the ground running tomorrow with a clear advantage in this race. [**Quick, before the polls close and the vote counting begins, will you chip in $10 to show Tom 's opponent-to-be that we have the momentum in this race, and we will NOT let them defeat Tom?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.28_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | ****[Primary Day Fund: CHIP IN>>](http://action.tomohalleran. Tom is serious when he says that things are about to escalate, quickly, in this race. We should expect the far-right's Super PACs to come together immediately to prop up Tom's far-right opponent and mislead Arizona voters about his strong record of fighting for them in Congress.

So we can't wait for his opponent to be named to start preparing -- we need [**your help**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.28_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") NOW. [**Please, chip in if you can >>**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.28_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thanks,

Team O'Halleran

\-----forwarded message-----
From: Tom O'Halleran
Subject: tonight, I learn my opponent

Friend,

_I need your help today._

It's primary election day in Arizona -- which means my team is very busy, helping voters get to the polls so they can show their support for our campaign. [_**(You can chip in to support their efforts here!)**_](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.28_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

**Primary Day also means that we will soon learn, tonight, which of my far-right opponents will be on the ballot in November** \-- and I'm writing you now because I need [**your support**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.28_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")today, so we can start the general election in a formidable position and keep AZ-01 blue.

[**Friend, will you make a donation to my campaign this Primary Day -- so we can show my far-right opponent that this grassroots team can take them?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.28_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

[$10](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.28_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$25](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.28_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$50](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.28_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---|---|---
[$100](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.28_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$250](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.28_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=250&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [Other](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.28_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Serving Arizona families in Congress over the past year and a half has been the honor of my life -- and I am confident that this grassroots team will help me win re-election in November by sharing my record with voters across our district.

But I am the MOST VULNERABLE Democrat in the entire U.S. House, according to nonpartisan election-watchers -- so we can't take anything for granted in this race. The far-right and their Super PACs are already spending big money in our community in an attempt to unseat me, _**and their efforts will only escalate -- dramatically -- tomorrow, after my opponent has been formally nominated.**_

[**Friends, make a donation today to send my far-right opponent and their Super PACs a message: This grassroots team has what it takes to defeat them in November, and I will continue to fight for Arizona in Congress.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.28_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Yours,

Tom O'Halleran

****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.28_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**

name: Kyrsten Sinema
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
We won the primary election. Now I have something important to ask you, and it can't wait. |
---
|
---
| Team -

We did it.

Thanks to the support of hundreds of thousands of Arizonans, we won the primary election for U.S. Senate. To everyone who volunteered, donated, and helped us share our message, thank you. I am so grateful for your support.

Now the real work begins.

This will be a tough fight - one of the toughest Senate elections in the country - but I know that with grassroots support, we can defeat the special interests and win this race.

**[So I'm asking: Friend, can you chip in just $5 now to kick-off the General Election? There's never been a more important time to give.](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-kickoff?amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=2+-+So+Irsquom+asking+FIRSTNAMEFriend+can+yo&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180828_3_3&source=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180828_3_3&refcode=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180828_3_3")**

**[DONATE NOW](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-kickoff?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+NOW&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180828_3_3&source=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180828_3_3&refcode=KS_EM_FR_B90D_180828_3_3")**
We know the battle ahead will be hard. But with stakes this high, the fight is worth it.

Together I know we can cut through the chaos in Washington, fix our broken health care system, keep our promises to seniors, and make sure every Arizonan gets his or her shot at the American Dream.

But to win this election, I need you to step up now.

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Thank you, Florida!
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3740/9e00690/5b2ed746/24028fd1/1081250694/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/")
Friends,

Tonight, we proved what's possible when people come together and show up -- and I can't begin to describe how excited and humbled I am.

**Thanks to people like you, I am honored to accept the Democratic nomination in the race to be Florida 's next Governor.**

From the beginning of this campaign, I knew that it would be an uphill battle. But thanks to your incredible generosity, support, and commitment to making Florida a better place for all of us, we've won the primary election.

Listen, this campaign is proof that you can come from the bottom and get to the top with heart, hard work, and a commitment to everyday working people. That's how we won tonight -- and how we're going to win again in November.

**[Chip in $5 now to keep the momentum going and elect a true progressive to the Governor's mansion.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3740/9e00690/5b2ed746/24028fd0/1081250694/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-primary-win?gpsid=13_55_3212&refcode=em18_180828_PriWIN_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180828_PriWIN_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil")**

I cannot even begin to thank you enough for your help as we bring it home. Let's get to work on winning in November.

Bring it home,

Andrew Gillum

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3740/9e00690/5b2ed746/24028fd0/1081250694/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-primary-win?gpsid=13_55_3212&refcode=em18_180828_PriWIN_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180828_PriWIN_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
1550 Melvin Street,
Tallahassee, FL 32303

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3740/9e00690/5b2ed746/24028fd3/1081250694/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). \-- Begin Forwarded Message: --

Team -

Now the real work begins.

This will be a tough fight - one of the toughest Senate elections in the country - but I know that with grassroots support, we can defeat the special interests and win this race.

name: Tabitha Isner
subject: A free Toyota Camry?!?
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62300/images/Logos/Logo3.PNG]

"Is it true that every refugee gets a free Toyota Camry?"

Dear Friend,

I used to work for a refugee resettlement agency in St. Louis. There we welcomed refugees from the moment they got off the plane - usually with just a small plastic bag of photos and paperwork in hand - and accompanied them as they learned their way in this new place. We received approximately $8,000 per refugee to provide food, clothing, shelter, and supports to get them "settled."

Part of my job there was to give tours of the facility to community groups. The one question I got more than any other was, "Is it true that every refugee gets a free Toyota Camry?"

The question didn't spring from nowhere. It had its origins in the fact (or at least the reasonable perception) that many Bosnian refugees in St. Louis drove a Toyota Camry. But rather than imagine that these refugees had simply purchased these reasonable cars through frugality and responsibility, folks assumed that the refugees must have somehow cheated and gotten something they didn't deserve. And so the rumor spread.
It's a disturbing trend, this instinct to distrust our neighbors. We see it happen in conversations about SNAP and about TANF and about Disability benefits. We tend to overestimate what others are getting and underestimate their worthiness.

But if we keep that up, we will soon live in a world where no one dares reach out their hand to help another, where no one risks kindness for fear of being taken advantage of, where each person must face alone the storm that blows around them.

I, for one, have no desire to live in such a world. I believe we are our best when we let kindness and generosity lead us, when we look for the best in one another and assume that others will see the best in us too.

I'm running for Congress to protect refugees from discrimination, to protect immigrant children from being separated from their parents, to protect SNAP, and TANF, and SSI. But more fundamentally, I'm running for Congress to protect our souls from that life-sucking ideology that builds walls of distrust between neighbors.

Nothing could be more pressing.

Let's restore community.
Let's restore trust in one another.
Chip in $10 today to be part of that mission.

Click Here to Donate: [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LI9jtJ3r10G0qWgG5dHhYA2]

Connect With Us:Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/TabithaIsner] Contact Info: Call Tabitha at 334-538-4822
Twitter [http://www.twitter.com/TabithaK] Checks made out to "Friends of Tabitha Isner" can be sent to:
Campaign HQ Address: PO Box 6340
1460 Ann St. Montgomery, AL 36106
Montgomery, AL 36106

#
# _NYT: “Dozens at Facebook Unite to Challenge Its ‘Intolerant’ Liberal Culture”_
“The post went up quietly on Facebook’s internal message board last week. Titled ‘We Have a Problem With Political Diversity,’ it quickly took off inside the social network,” Kate Conger and Sheera Frenkel report for _The New York Times_. “We are a political monoculture that’s intolerant of different views,” senior Facebook engineer Brian Amerige wrote in the post. [**Click here to read more.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI5Ljk0MjEwMjgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyOS45NDIxMDI4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc5MDk5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.nytimes.com/2018/08/28/technology/inside-facebook-employees-political-bias.html) “Consumer confidence rose in August to its highest level since October 2000, building on July’s solid result,” [**Michael Sheetz reports**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI5Ljk0MjEwMjgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyOS45NDIxMDI4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc5MDk5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/cnbc-consumer-confidence-pops-august-highest-level-since-october-2000/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr) for CNBC. “These historically high confidence levels should continue to support healthy consumer spending in the near-term,” said Lynn Franco, director of economic indicators at The Conference Board. “The Senate reached a deal Tuesday to swiftly confirm seven federal district court judges, helping President Donald Trump put an enduring stamp on the U.S. judiciary,” Sahil Kapur reports for [**_Bloomberg_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI5Ljk0MjEwMjgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyOS45NDIxMDI4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc5MDk5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2018-08-28/mcconnell-s-senate-continues-to-rapidly-confirm-trump-s-judges). “The latest confirmations mean Trump, with the help of Republican Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell, has already confirmed 60 judges to the courts." In [**_The Hill_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI5Ljk0MjEwMjgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyOS45NDIxMDI4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc5MDk5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&http://thehill.com/homenews/senate/404052-pence-if-we-lived-in-more-respectful-time-kavanaugh-would-be-overwhelmingly), John Bowden shares Vice President Mike Pence’s views on Judge Brett Kavanaugh’s confirmation process. “Justice Antonin Scalia was confirmed 98-0 and Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg received support of 96 Senators. If we lived in a more respectful time, Judge Brett Kavanaugh would be overwhelmingly confirmed,” the Vice President wrote. “U.S. and Mexican trade negotiators proved the naysayers wrong by striking a new deal replacing the North American Free Trade Agreement (NAFTA), Mexican Secretary of Foreign Affairs Luis Videgaray Caso said Monday night,” Kathryn Blackhurst writes in** _[LifeZette](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI5Ljk0MjEwMjgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyOS45NDIxMDI4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc5MDk5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.lifezette.com/2018/08/top-mexican-official-says-trump-proved-naysayers-wrong-on-nafta/)._** “A lot of people thought that NAFTA would be over last year — early last year — and that there was no way to fix this relationship," Caso said.
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI5Ljk0MjEwMjgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyOS45NDIxMDI4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc5MDk5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI5Ljk0MjEwMjgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyOS45NDIxMDI4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc5MDk5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI5Ljk0MjEwMjgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyOS45NDIxMDI4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc5MDk5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)
The White House · 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, NW · Washington DC 20500 · 202-456-1111

Peter, this is not a drill.
**Moments ago, we learned that out-of-state dark money groups backing our opponent have launched a $2 MILLION negative ad buy against Phil Bredesen. Rest assured: The claims in these negative ads are false.**
These ads are going to air all across Tennessee, and they’re just the beginning of the “10,000” cuts that our opponent’s campaign has threatened to deliver to Governor Bredesen in the final months of this campaign.
The Washington establishment will pay whatever it takes to drag this race into the mud and buy this election to protect the status quo. But we can’t afford to let that happen.
We need to keep this race focused on the issues that matter to Tennesseans and not get caught up in these toxic attacks coming from out-of-state Super PACs. But we need your help to do that -- so I have to ask:
**Can Phil count on you to chip in $10 or whatever you can today so we have the resources to fight back against these attacks and keep this race focused on real issues here in Tennessee?**

clean_body: | "Koch brothers' network launches $2 million anti-Bredesen ad in Tennessee's US Senate race" —The Tennessean, 8/29/18 If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = Peter, this is not a drill. Moments ago, we learned that out-of-state dark money groups backing our opponent have launched a $2 MILLION negative ad buy against Phil Bredesen. Rest assured: The claims in these negative ads are false. These ads are going to air all across Tennessee, and they’re just the beginning of the “10,000” cuts that our opponent’s campaign has threatened to deliver to Governor Bredesen in the final months of this campaign. The Washington establishment will pay whatever it takes to drag this race into the mud and buy this election to protect the status quo. But we can’t afford to let that happen. We need to keep this race focused on the issues that matter to Tennesseans and not get caught up in these toxic attacks coming from out-of-state Super PACs. But we need your help to do that -- so I have to ask: Can Phil count on you to chip in $10 or whatever you can today so we have the resources to fight back against these attacks and keep this race focused on real issues here in Tennessee?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Your donations go to the fields offices, mailers, ads, and organizing efforts that are critical to us getting Governor Bredesen’s positive message of getting things done in front of Tennessee voters. Grassroots support is what’s going to decide the outcome of this race -- and with you having our back, I know that means we’ll be electing Phil Bredesen to the U.S. Senate this November. Thanks for your help, Bob Corney Campaign Manager Bredesen for Senate Paid for by Bredesen for Senate Bredesen for Senate P.O. Box 92010 Nashville, TN 37209 United States

name: Mel Hall
subject: No shortcuts, no excuses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friends,

I've believed my whole life that what you do speaks much louder than what you say.

So while our current representatives in Washington talk a good game about how focused they are on working for us, and how bipartisan they are, the simple truth is that they aren't delivering the results that Hoosier families need.

Washington is broken. Congress is distracted by special interests and divided along party lines. What we need are folks who are willing to put their heads down, focus on their districts, and work to get things done.

That's why I'm running for Congress. Because you don't need excuses, you need results.

**[Chip in $5 to help me take this seat back for Hoosier families.](https://act.myngp.com/el/BkjrwThVWZOzu6uR0mwllT7TaKgAuxCK98QfsEUbsRA=/3NqmTMdaKMLMXq3_lrlue9w_ZndnUYhH4MBLrMaTQ4g=?refcode=em180829)**

Thinking this way isn't something new to me. I've dedicated my life to service and hard work.

When I went to work at Press Ganey, I worked my way up. I listened to the people I worked with, and then did something about it.

There weren't any shortcuts, we just had to do the work. So we did, and together we created over 800 jobs right here in northern Indiana.

**If you share my belief in the value of hard work, please make a donation today and help send me to Congress to get things done for Indiana.**
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/BkjrwThVWZOzu6uR0mwllT7TaKgAuxCK98QfsEUbsRA=/3NqmTMdaKMLMXq3_lrlue9w_ZndnUYhH4MBLrMaTQ4g=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em180829)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/BkjrwThVWZOzu6uR0mwllT7TaKgAuxCK98QfsEUbsRA=/3NqmTMdaKMLMXq3_lrlue9w_ZndnUYhH4MBLrMaTQ4g=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em180829)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/BkjrwThVWZOzu6uR0mwllT7TaKgAuxCK98QfsEUbsRA=/3NqmTMdaKMLMXq3_lrlue9w_ZndnUYhH4MBLrMaTQ4g=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em180829)
[Express Donate: $200](https://act.myngp.com/el/BkjrwThVWZOzu6uR0mwllT7TaKgAuxCK98QfsEUbsRA=/3NqmTMdaKMLMXq3_lrlue9w_ZndnUYhH4MBLrMaTQ4g=?express_lane=true&amount=200&refcode=em180829)
[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/BkjrwThVWZOzu6uR0mwllT7TaKgAuxCK98QfsEUbsRA=/3NqmTMdaKMLMXq3_lrlue9w_ZndnUYhH4MBLrMaTQ4g=?refcode=em180829)
In the next two months, you'll see me working hard to earn your vote, and with your help, you'll get to see me working even harder every day after that as your representative in Congress.

Thank you,

Mel

body:
**" Poll pegs Menendez's lead in single digits"**
_-NBC News, August 22, 2018_

[**We need to band together and tell Bob Hugin he can 't buy this U.S. Senate seat. Chip in $3 or more now to help us spread the word.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cb2/3af3c5d/3a614401/4ec3f986/1069341084/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_augeom?gpsid=5_73_3185&refcode=em18_180829_8EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180829_8EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+We+need+to+band+together+and+tell+Bob+Hu") **[DONATE](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cb2/3af3c5d/3a614401/4ec3f979/1069341084/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_augeom?gpsid=5_73_3185&refcode=em18_180829_8EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180829_8EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+DONATE")** Friend,

We knew from the beginning that Bob Hugin would stop at nothing to buy this Senate seat for his buddy, Donald Trump.

He has been spending millions to buy up TV time and used his ads to spread lies and smear Bob Menendez's record of helping people here in New Jersey. Worst of all - Hugin is using the money he made price-gouging cancer patients for life-saving medicine to do it!

Now, new polls show that this race is getting closer. We need your help to make sure he can't mislead New Jersey voters and buy this election.

[**Hugin may have deep pockets but we have the support of people like you, Friend. If you support Bob Menendez and are ready to fight for our future, chip in $3 or more and help us raise $6,491 more to hit our end-of-month goal before Friday night.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cb2/3af3c5d/3a614401/4ec3f978/1069341084/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_augeom?gpsid=5_73_3185&refcode=em18_180829_8EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180829_8EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+Hugin+may+have+deep+pockets+but+we+have+") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [**Express Donate: $5**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cb2/3af3c5d/3a614401/4ec3f97b/1069341084/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_augeom?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em18_180829_8EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx_5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=menendez&utm_content=4+-+Express+Donate+5&utm_campaign=em18_180829_8EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&source=em18_180829_8EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx") [**Express Donate: $10**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cb2/3af3c5d/3a614401/4ec3f97a/1069341084/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_augeom?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em18_180829_8EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx_10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=menendez&utm_content=5+-+Express+Donate+10&utm_campaign=em18_180829_8EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&source=em18_180829_8EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx") [**Express Donate: $25**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cb2/3af3c5d/3a614401/4ec3f97d/1069341084/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_augeom?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em18_180829_8EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx_25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=menendez&utm_content=6+-+Express+Donate+25&utm_campaign=em18_180829_8EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&source=em18_180829_8EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx") [**Or, donate another amount**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cb2/3af3c5d/3a614401/4ec3f97c/1069341084/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_augeom?refcode=em18_180829_8EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx_other&utm_medium=email&utm_source=menendez&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em18_180829_8EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&source=em18_180829_8EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx") Hugin may be able to outspend us, but the people of New Jersey will not support him once they know the truth about his past and his loyalty to Donald Trump.

Senator Bob Menendez is on our side, fighting for affordable health care, equal pay, and lower prescription drug costs - because that is what New Jersey needs.

[**But if we are going to be successful in November and keep a proven leader like Bob Menendez in office, we need your help. Chip in $3 or more right now towards our end-of-month goal.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cb2/3af3c5d/3a614401/4ec3f97f/1069341084/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_augeom?gpsid=5_73_3185&refcode=em18_180829_8EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180829_8EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=8+-+But+if+we+are+going+to+be+successful+in+")

Thank you,

Erin

Erin Dolan
Menendez for Senate

name: [AFP] Tim Phillips
subject: The future of the Supreme Court…
body:
Alert: Confirm Kavanaugh! Americans for Prosperity
---
| | | [View in browser](http://tracking.mail2.myprosperitymail.com/dm?id=C517293AE5D8531FD849D32E05324E07E2BE70A9624817B5) |
---|---|---|---
---
| [ ](http://tracking.mail2.myprosperitymail.com/t?r=4723&c=5243&l=77&ctl=8A4E:C517293AE5D8531FD849D32E05324E07E2BE70A9624817B5&)
---
|
Peter, **The battle to confirm Judge Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court is entering a critical phase**. With a confirmation hearing being held in just a few days, we need your help now more than ever!

_AFP has mobilized our entire army of activists_ to spread the word about just how qualified President Trump’s nominee is, urging the Senate to confirm him as quickly as possible. Our efforts have reached millions of Americans.

In fact, **in Indiana alone** , activists like you have made more than **220,000 calls** mobilizing grassroots pressure on Senator Donnelly to support Judge Kavanaugh.
| [CONFIRM KAVANAUGH](http://tracking.mail2.myprosperitymail.com/t?r=4723&c=5243&l=77&ctl=8A4C:C517293AE5D8531FD849D32E05324E07E2BE70A9624817B5&)
---

_But despite these amazing efforts, it isn’t enough._

Many lawmakers are playing partisan games and attempting to obstruct the confirmation process, but we refuse to let political agendas get in the way of a qualified jurist who will protect our rights and defend the constitution.

[Can we count on your support? This fight is too important to sit out.](http://tracking.mail2.myprosperitymail.com/t?r=4723&c=5243&l=77&ctl=8A4C:C517293AE5D8531FD849D32E05324E07E2BE70A9624817B5&)

Thank you for all that you do!

Sincerely,

Tim Phillips
President
Americans for Prosperity

_**P.S. Can you help spread the word by[forwarding this email](http://tracking.mail2.myprosperitymail.com/bin/ftaf?id=C517293AE5D8531FD849D32E05324E07E2BE70A9624817B5) to 5 friends and encouraging them to get involved? **_

This email was sent by: Americans for Prosperity
**Americans For Prosperity**
1310 N. Courthouse Road, Suite 700
Arlington, VA 22201
We respect your right to privacy - [view our policy](http://tracking.mail2.myprosperitymail.com/t?r=4723&c=5243&l=77&ctl=8A4D:C517293AE5D8531FD849D32E05324E07E2BE70A9624817B5&)
[UNSUBSCRIBE](https://americansforprosperity.org/email-opt-out.php?sfid=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&realm=i360&wc_optout=http://tracking.mail2.myprosperitymail.com/u?id=C517293AE5D8531FD849D32E05324E07E2BE70A9624817B5&global=true&utm_source=NEWSLETTER&utm_medium=EMAIL&utm_campaign=GENERAL&utm_term=GENERIC&utm_content=UNSUB)

subject: Watch Molly's New Ad

body:
[](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4934/d0ce7de/51e39ba1/9cd5ace/3335934121/VEsH/ "http://www.mollykelly.com")

Dear Friends,
We're thrilled to share our second TV ad with you! Because of your support, we were able to launch a new ad highlighting Molly's message to put Granite Staters first.
The ad, "People Energy," says Granite Staters are getting slammed with higher electric bills under Governor Sununu, who has received more than $50,000 in contributions from Eversource while carrying out the utility's agenda, including vetoing two renewable energy bills.
In contrast, the ad features Kelly's refusal to accept corporate contributions and her commitment to put people first. As governor, Molly will work for you.
**[Watch Molly's new TV ad!](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4934/d0ce7de/51e39ba1/9cd5acd/3335934121/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibW9sbHlzZWNvbmR0dmFkIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxNTAtb3QtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mollysecondtvad?refcode=jtk150-ot-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Tina Smith
subject: Pence is back in Minnesota tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
The White House, Mitch McConnell, and all the big money Republican donors have drawn a target around this race.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4af75/c1f7015/6a390fb3/1141cbcc/496839923/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180829_em-full&recurring=auto") Friend, Friday at midnight is a big deadline for our campaign. Here's why:
* The Cook Political Report just downgraded our race and moved it one step closer to Republicans.
* Two polls have come out this month putting this race within single digits. One within the margin of error.
* My GOP opponent just got back from a big money fundraiser with top Senate Republicans in Georgia. So we know we can expect all that special interest money to hit the airwaves against us soon.
* And tomorrow Vice President Pence is coming to Minnesota _again_ to host a big money fundraiser to help our GOP opponent.

**We have to hit our August goals if we are going to respond to the attacks we are about to face and stop Republicans from turning this seat red.[We still need to raise $14,891 before midnight on Friday -- can you make your first contribution when it's most critical?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4af75/c1f7015/6a390fb3/1141cbcc/496839923/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180829_em-full&recurring=auto")** **[Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4af75/c1f7015/6a390fb3/1141cbcc/496839923/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180829_em-full&recurring=auto")** The White House, Mitch McConnell, and all the big money Republican donors have drawn a target around this race. Let's show them we're fighting back. Thank you for everything you are doing, Tina | **Tina Smith is a fierce progressive running for U.S. Senate in a special election in Minnesota. That 's why Senate Republicans and Donald Trump have made her one of their top targets. clean_body: The White House, Mitch McConnell, and all the big money Republican donors have drawn a target around this race. | "" Friend, Friday at midnight is a big deadline for our campaign. Here's why: The Cook Political Report just downgraded our race and moved it one step closer to Republicans. Two polls have come out this month putting this race within single digits. One within the margin of error. My GOP opponent just got back from a big money fundraiser with top Senate Republicans in Georgia. So we know we can expect all that special interest money to hit the airwaves against us soon. And tomorrow Vice President Pence is coming to Minnesota again to host a big money fundraiser to help our GOP opponent. We have to hit our August goals if we are going to respond to the attacks we are about to face and stop Republicans from turning this seat red. "" "" The White House, Mitch McConnell, and all the big money Republican donors have drawn a target around this race. Let's show them we're fighting back. Thank you for everything you are doing, Tina | Tina Smith is a fierce progressive running for U.S. Senate in a special election in Minnesota. That 's why Senate Republicans and Donald Trump have made her one of their top targets. She needs your help if she is going to win this tough race. ""

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Bring it home
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3745/9e00690/5b65afa6/24028837/2334595770/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180829_PriWIN_fnd_gq_resend__AG_ettx&source=em18_180829_PriWIN_fnd_gq_resend__AG_ettx")
Friends,

Last night, we proved what's possible when people come together and show up -- and I can't begin to describe how excited and humbled I am.

**Thanks to people like you, I am honored to accept the Democratic nomination in the race to be Florida 's next Governor.**

From the beginning of this campaign, I knew that it would be an uphill battle. But thanks to your incredible generosity, support, and commitment to making Florida a better place for all of us, we've won the primary election.

Listen, this campaign is proof that you can come from the bottom and get to the top with heart, hard work, and a commitment to everyday working people. That's how we won last night -- and how we're going to win again in November.

**[Chip in $5 now to keep the momentum going and elect a true progressive to the Governor's mansion.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3745/9e00690/5b65afa6/24028836/2334595770/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-primary-win?gpsid=13_55_3214&refcode=em18_180829_PriWIN_fnd_gq_resend__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180829_PriWIN_fnd_gq_resend__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in++ask++now+to+keep+the+momentum+g")**

I cannot even begin to thank you enough for your help as we bring it home. Let's get to work on winning in November.

Bring it home,

Andrew Gillum

body:
_Please see a special message from our sponsor._ Democrats are raising money at a rapid (alarming) rate, and we cannot afford to let Senate Republicans fall behind. **From the desk of Newt Gingrich**
Fellow Conservative,

Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, Elizabeth Warren, Hillary Clinton, Barack Obama, and their liberal mainstream media allies are doing everything they can to divide Republicans this year. Liberal elites want to take away our Republican Majority and put an end to President Trump’s agenda this November.

Democrats are raising money at an alarming rate, and we cannot afford to let Senate Republicans fall behind. [**Will you join me in supporting Senate Republicans today?**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjQxLWNiMjEzNzg4NTk2YjQwOTc5ZTAyYjExMDVmZDRmZWJl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3AYm9keV90eHRfd2lsbF95b3Vfam9pbl9tZQ%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubnJzYy5vcmcvZG9uYXRpb25fcGFnZS80eC1tYXRjaC1hY3RuLz9yZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9QUUtR09QMyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAxODA4MjlfQUUtR09QM19OZXd0R2luZ3JpY2gmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAxODA4MjlfV2FrZVVwQ2FsbCZhY3Rpb249ZW1haWxfY2xpY2smaGExPQ&K=aWIsJ6jGgigPNm5kK7K3Og)

**Republicans are strongest when we stand together!** The liberal mainstream media is willing to do and say almost anything to defeat our Making America Great Again agenda. Their strong desire to return America to the failed policies of Barack Obama is evident. **We must help Senate Republicans fight back.[ Please chip in $25 or more now.](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjQxLWNiMjEzNzg4NTk2YjQwOTc5ZTAyYjExMDVmZDRmZWJl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3AYm9keV90eHRfMjVfb3JfbW9yZQ%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubnJzYy5vcmcvZG9uYXRpb25fcGFnZS80eC1tYXRjaC1hY3RuLz9yZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9QUUtR09QMyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAxODA4MjlfQUUtR09QM19OZXd0R2luZ3JpY2gmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAxODA4MjlfV2FrZVVwQ2FsbCZhY3Rpb249ZW1haWxfY2xpY2smaGExPSZhbW91bnQ9MjU&K=2UjAsHJ2LoMoI8Or56pwLA)**

I need you to stand with our Republican Senate team. We only have 2 days until the August 31st FEC-mandated filing deadline. That is not much time for Senate Republicans to catch up to their liberal opponents.

[**Could you pitch in $25, $50, or even $100 to help our Republican Senate campaigns defeat Democrats this year?**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjQxLWNiMjEzNzg4NTk2YjQwOTc5ZTAyYjExMDVmZDRmZWJl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3AYm9keV90eHRfY291bGRfeW91X3BpdGNoX2lu%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubnJzYy5vcmcvZG9uYXRpb25fcGFnZS80eC1tYXRjaC1hY3RuLz9yZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9QUUtR09QMyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAxODA4MjlfQUUtR09QM19OZXd0R2luZ3JpY2gmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAxODA4MjlfV2FrZVVwQ2FsbCZhY3Rpb249ZW1haWxfY2xpY2smaGExPQ&K=wasEbEJrdJupH8hCXCHPIg)

Your support will go directly toward ensuring Republicans have the resources to respond to the negative and misleading attacks that the Democrats are launching. **As you read this, negative ads are being launched, smearing the reputations of our upstanding conservative candidates. We must fight back and spread the truth.** Your decision to get in the game or stay on the sidelines could be the difference between Republican victories and Republican defeats in November. This election is going to come down to the wire, and we need all Republicans to band together to support President Trump’s Conservative Majority.

I need your help to ensure that we defeat Democrats, strengthen our Republican Majority, and advance our Making America Great Again agenda. [**This is so important that Senate Republicans will quadruple-match all donations made today.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjQxLWNiMjEzNzg4NTk2YjQwOTc5ZTAyYjExMDVmZDRmZWJl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3AYm9keV90eHRfdGhpc19pc19zb19pbXBvcnRhbnQ%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubnJzYy5vcmcvZG9uYXRpb25fcGFnZS80eC1tYXRjaC1hY3RuLz9yZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9QUUtR09QMyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAxODA4MjlfQUUtR09QM19OZXd0R2luZ3JpY2gmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAxODA4MjlfV2FrZVVwQ2FsbCZhY3Rpb249ZW1haWxfY2xpY2smaGExPQ&K=tUxg8_Dn1QKZ0vzzfw0F0w)

Newt Gingrich

body:
I’ve been hitting the campaign trail with our Team Pence volunteers. We’re making thousands of phone calls, going door to door, and delivering yard... [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=57d5cf8777604ef4a0e4d3c7162e3335&_e=0lIaW7t7NAUItAkhCI7pVGBqj3y4-RZqUSIWKix8FDjbqP8fmgO3B5KGs9BwRqHT-fCaoVAS-iD4NdkDjp268ZULr-yaCCsW9mppPAN_9ST0wbnJPe5TvPy6YcnorpbVkUHd1T2NHFA6oMuB84TyhjPvSpmz5L5hU57eWgD0e1OURv9gD6v9wuToyhqf20NLj-du_RenXCe0HPfrDJa3696JL4z1mfO-UgoPxpz-h82vMvXez1hsZV_nvYrEJxPWY8hADNMfE-iYct9-Yzj9iTh_xB80RPtRxmnzZLVkY7GmnPCgPaokPSMQMZfY3QYxMw_Nv5YlFqDXmyM014tYi7sVz80YBRAG1SjPHabl-OiupkMB0an92b_ZTarxMToDFg-bztIFPYk1FluPECFOx4eeam9qlCd5mYMOXW48tMY%3D) | |

I’ve been hitting the campaign trail with our Team Pence volunteers. We’re making thousands of phone calls, going door to door, and delivering yard signs around the Sixth District to earn every vote.

The enthusiasm they bring reminds me of what I’m fighting for – our shared Hoosier values.

YOUR Hoosier priorities are MY priorities.

**[Donate $6 to help me fight for our conservative Hoosier priorities and the Trump-Pence Make America Great Again agenda>>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=57d5cf8777604ef4a0e4d3c7162e3335&_e=0lIaW7t7NAUItAkhCI7pVGBqj3y4-RZqUSIWKix8FDjbqP8fmgO3B5KGs9BwRqHTlkNjDa5jU3HBU_1eRrmnXVXRgQdkCtbESjpdOb92V8lq7Pw2sLmPwrVM4TbKJQGx1Ci3ngpt45s0copXv2H_wN6YIrXfoAEylFieWW_3fdW9Xi8QesjE0ILRl838bxZirv7uTBkPhMO-D_QRl9itlimy0LrSe2j4O3vmFvJX4C4oS6sK_E-QHHZ4O5HW5MoiD4aHdU9eNa7TKJ3ZpCeHHhiAUyNIQnSGeWt1GSbUqURskYKrIOUezDtStlOOYoE8hDSAHWL2udTqif5vqMnJb1DiaANCfsi3hLEE4xdsBOeLB4xNB-trTf0rpdtwlLpE-D3JSmLprfDFlPl9N8Sj0sf51yLrULJ67DM0Q89Kuj8%3D)**

But, before we close the books on what has been a busy month of campaigning, we are up against one of the last few deadlines of our campaign – **the August End of Month Fundraising Deadline.**

With Election Day coming up quickly, we’re setting a big goal. Our goal is to raise **$20,000** and we only have 2 days to do it.

**[Stand with me for our conservative Hoosier values and keep our momentum surging by donating any amount>>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=57d5cf8777604ef4a0e4d3c7162e3335&_e=0lIaW7t7NAUItAkhCI7pVGBqj3y4-RZqUSIWKix8FDjbqP8fmgO3B5KGs9BwRqHT-fCaoVAS-iD4NdkDjp268ZULr-yaCCsW9mppPAN_9ST0wbnJPe5TvPy6YcnorpbVkUHd1T2NHFA6oMuB84TyhjPvSpmz5L5hU57eWgD0e1OURv9gD6v9wuToyhqf20NLj-du_RenXCe0HPfrDJa362_vTwlQOpPale1HXvivVR9HDeZzh4LmDnNSjHJAS9yiGY_9BsdhL1sEA1ankwT8oVv5NziSO6iZEwOZhR-ao7LVV6yFw-7jc0TmEw_40_CLbOFS-A4rUEzWM0qmJV5e86yO0DQUPJg1qblbr6hS10GOb4cfB0zTpCgp7t4n8OPKRWH9pnx-ipsFymnxQwkEgCYhzTAYPwyLoY7wysE4swE%3D)**

I’m Ready to Serve, Again!
Greg Pence

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Guest?=
subject: Bully Bloc Endorses Michael Guest
body:
Advocate For Improving Higher Education, Bully Bloc, Has Endorsed District 3 Candidate Michael Guest | | |
---
| [ ](https://michaelguest.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae3ece7e42a6ae24d22e0094b&id=95e9daffe5&e=6645c92bcf)
---
|
---
| _**Bully Bloc Endorses Michael Guest**_
---
| | I’m honored and appreciative to have the endorsement of Bully Bloc.

If elected, I will serve to represent the entire Third Congressional District and to ensure that our colleges and universities are well-equipped to train the next generation of leaders and innovators.

We are blessed in Mississippi to enjoy a wonderful quality of life and a hope for a brighter future – which is due in large part to the work of institutions like Mississippi State University, our community and junior colleges, and all other institutions of higher learning.
---

**Adam Laxalt has used his taxpayer-funded position to be a lackey for dark-money special interests and political allies. And every Nevadan needs to know it.**
**That 's why we just launched [LackeyLaxalt.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z6RGJaxTJ9DTJY8bEXQM-KNaFteQx0wHD7d2AzL3oHY=/6c0M24PMXF1o_SA2XuYEGwSnBfSlm_oWQWDUjP03tgE=). Go check out the new site >>**

Dear Friend,

The evidence is staggering. From serving special interest donors and shielding political allies to ignoring the will of Nevada voters, Adam Laxalt is no friend to everyday Nevadans.

That's why we've launched **[LackeyLaxalt.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z6RGJaxTJ9DTJY8bEXQM-KNaFteQx0wHD7d2AzL3oHY=/6c0M24PMXF1o_SA2XuYEGwSnBfSlm_oWQWDUjP03tgE=)** to get the truth out about Adam Laxalt's record. No Nevadan should vote without knowing the facts.

Laxalt has continually put the needs of the Kochs, Donald Trump, and his special interest backers ahead of Nevada voters. Nevadans deserve better than Lackey Laxalt.

**[It's important that all Nevadans know the real Adam Laxalt. Meet Lackey Laxalt and learn more about how he's used his taxpayer-funded position to be a lackey for his dark-money donors. name: Martin Heinrich
subject: This campaign is now completely different
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | In less than 72 hours, I face my first end-of-month budget deadline since Libertarian and former two-term New Mexico Governor Gary Johnson entered the Senate race.

**Johnson just donated six-figures to his own campaign, and he already has a super PAC on the ground ready to prop up his campaign.** It is more important than ever that we hit our budget goals. Read more below on how my race changed this month, and **_[contribute here to make sure we can take on the coming attacks from Johnson.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-august-deadline-2018?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+contribute+here+to+make+sure+we+can+take&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180829_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180829_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180829_1_1")_**
_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | **[Donate $10](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-august-deadline-2018?express_lane=true&amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+Donate+ask&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180829_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180829_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180829_1_1")** | **[Donate $29](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-august-deadline-2018?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+Donate+ask&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180829_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180829_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180829_1_1")**
---|---|---
* * *

We had a busy few weeks -- we're ending this month with a completely different campaign than when we started.

This election was flipped on its head when former Republican governor of New Mexico Gary Johnson entered the race as a Libertarian. Johnson has a national network of wealthy backers and a super PAC already working to sway this election.

**[HELP DEFEAT GARY JOHNSON>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-august-deadline-2018?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+HELP+DEFEAT+GARY+JOHNSON+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180829_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180829_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180829_1_1")**
We're not taking anything for granted. My campaign released two television ads in the past month, and we're expanding our on-the-ground presence so we can talk to even more voters. Our growing campaign means an ever increasing budget, however, and that's why I am asking for your help today.

**On Friday I have my first monthly budget deadline since Johnson entered the race, and we simply can 't miss this goal. I'm not relying on shadowy super PACs like Johnson is -- I'm trusting grassroots supporters like you to help power my campaign.**

**_[We need to raise another $40,000 before midnight Friday to reach our budget goal. Please, can you contribute today so I have what it takes to defeat Gary Johnson in November?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-august-deadline-2018?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+We+need+to+raise+another+40000+before+mi&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180829_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180829_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180829_1_1")_**

**[Donate $29 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. ****[Donate $50 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-august-deadline-2018?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=9+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180829_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180829_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180829_1_1")****
**[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-august-deadline-2018?amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=10+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180829_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180829_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180829_1_1")**
You've stood by me when it mattered most. Thank you for your support,

Martin

To compete against McClintock 's war chest and fight our hardest in this final stretch, we need to hit our goal by Friday at midnight. Please help by chipping in now: | ---|--- | | Thank you, Team Morse Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign. Jessica Morse for Congress 1079 Sunrise Ave Ste B 275 Roseville CA 95611 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please=.

| Hey Peter, since Bob sent his message this morning about these new dark money attacks, supporters have been stepping up and chipping in to reject the Washington establishment's attacks on Phil Bredesen. But the only way we're going to be able to keep this race focused on Tennessee instead of these false attacks is if we have the resources we need to get Governor Bredesen's positive message in front of voters. **Hundreds of grassroots supporters (like you) are making donations of $10 or whatever they can so we have what we need to fight back. Can Phil Bredesen count on your help too?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Chip in $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2039410/10611316/-1142930280?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjJkYjE3My1jMmFiLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ux9-9EiWpJE2oHyal2IEk7eM0Xz2KM6MKmlPq7kS2E=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em180829-kochs-2-express-tag&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)

— Team Bredesen

* * *

Peter, this is not a drill.
**Moments ago, we learned that out-of-state dark money groups backing our opponent have launched a $2 MILLION negative ad buy against Phil Bredesen. Rest assured: The claims in these negative ads are false.**
These ads are going to air all across Tennessee, and they’re just the beginning of the “10,000” cuts that our opponent’s campaign has threatened to deliver to Governor Bredesen in the final months of this campaign.
The Washington establishment will pay whatever it takes to drag this race into the mud and buy this election to protect the status quo. But we can’t afford to let that happen.
We need to keep this race focused on the issues that matter to Tennesseans and not get caught up in these toxic attacks coming from out-of-state Super PACs. But we need your help to do that -- so I have to ask:
**Can Phil count on you to chip in $10 or whatever you can today so we have the resources to fight back against these attacks and keep this race focused on real issues here in Tennessee?**

name: Team Beto
subject: We’re capable of making history.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

If we’re going to win in November, we need to believe we’re capable of
making history. We only get one shot. And it all comes down to ensuring
every person hears Beto's message.

If we don’t reach our end-of-month fundraising goal, we may not have the
resources we need to execute our winning organizing and get-out-the-vote
plan fully. And now, we’re especially worried because a pro-Cruz super PAC
just pledged to spend seven figures against Beto.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/6414?refcode=em20180829&t=1019&akid=5842%2E444211%2Evm9Sq_ ]So we’re asking: will you step up
today with a donation of
$3
to Beto’s campaign? Help us reach our end-of-month goal and fight back
against these super PAC attacks.

The only thing that can cut through the noise of a seven-figure ad buy is
simple: volunteers talking to voters about our campaign.

Our Field Director, Zack, and his team put together the biggest, most
ambitious plan possible to reach our goals and elect Beto to the Senate.
It’s going to take all of us putting in hard work these next few months to
make it happen.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/6414?refcode=em20180829&t=1020&akid=5842%2E444211%2Evm9Sq_ ]Your donations will ensure we are able to execute our winning field
plan and talk to millions of Texans about voting for Beto. But we need you
to pitch in right now to make sure we’re on track to reach our
end-of-month goal and fully fund our winning strategy.

Thanks,

Team Beto

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/6414?refcode=em20180829&t=1021&akid=5842%2E444211%2Evm9Sq_ ]Contribute
$3
»

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20180829footer&t=1022&akid=5842%2E444211%2Evm9Sq_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=5842%2E444211%2Evm9Sq_

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

body:
Update your donor status and take action today to help Marcy win! | | | Friend, Don't turn on the TV now! Here comes the deluge of attack ads we have been expecting. Billionaire Republican "soft-money" donors have begun to fuel attacks on Democratic candidates who are fighting for important things we care about such as:

* **_Protections for people with preexisting conditions and universal access to affordable health care;_**
* **_Rules that rein in Wall Street abuses;_**
* **_A living wage and fair playing field for U.S. workers;_**
* **_Affordable education and student debt reform._**

We need the help of grassroots supporters like you, Friend, to overcome the GOP’s efforts to divide us which is powered by hidden donors and dark money.
Frankly, we can’t make our fundraising goal to offset the attacks unless all of our grassroots supporters step up. Here’s what we found for you:

name: Dan Lipinski
subject: the EPA rollbacks need to be stopped
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress |
body:
Peter — You need to see this.

The Environmental Protection Agency, under Trump’s direction,
has announced rollbacks on environmental safety regulations that
its own analysis predicts will cause up to 1,400 premature deaths
in America.

HELP US STOP THE ROLLBACK
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-fight-epa-rollbacks?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180829_1_1&amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

In my time representing the working people of Illinois, I
have never seen a President so blatantly put the rights of
polluters over the health and lives of American families.

We’re calling on every supporter to help us join the fight to
resist these rollbacks. If we can raise $7,500 by midnight on the
31st, we can put those resources to work spreading the truth
about the coal lobbyists who are pushing this. Contribute here to
help us defeat the rollbacks →
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-fight-epa-rollbacks?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180829_1_1&amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

We need regular people to take the fight for our environment
into their own hands. Contribute through a button below to help

clean_body: Peter — You need to see this. The Environmental Protection Agency, under Trump’s direction, has announced rollbacks on environmental safety regulations that its own analysis predicts will cause up to 1,400 premature deaths in America. HELP US STOP THE ROLLBACK ( ) In my time representing the working people of Illinois, I have never seen a President so blatantly put the rights of polluters over the health and lives of American families. We’re calling on every supporter to help us join the fight to resist these rollbacks. If we can raise $7,500 by midnight on the 31st, we can put those resources to work spreading the truth about the coal lobbyists who are pushing this. Contribute here to help us defeat the rollbacks → ( ) We need regular people to take the fight for our environment into their own hands. Contribute through a button below to help us spread the word ASAP: CONTRIBUTE $5 ( ) CONTRIBUTE $10 ( ) CONTRIBUTE $25 ( ) CONTRIBUTE $50 ( ) CONTRIBUTE OTHER ( ) It’s not an exaggeration to say that these Rollbacks literally put profits over American lives. We need your help to defeat the rollbacks before their damage is permanent. Thanks for taking action, Dan Thanks for your support of our campaign. name: Tori Taylor
subject: Let me be direct: I have bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Let me be direct: I received some bad news. And now we have to raise $6,000 by midnight. I'll ask you to contribute to this Rapid Response Fund, but first let me walk you through what's going on. Our ground game has been incredible. We've knocked on thousands of doors, made phone calls, and registered voters throughout the district. Kathy has put thousands of miles on her car driving across the district talking with voters about what keeps them up at night. This is the largest grassroots effort North Carolina's 13th District has ever seen. And thanks to the hard work of people like you, this has become one of the most competitive races in the country. But our momentum is in jeopardy. Here's why: **_A Trump-linked Super PAC has committed nearly $1 MILLION in our race._** [**Now, I need you to donate $18 to our Rapid Response Fund.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279e4/e3b7d3/5dbb3a6c/255534a5/1777038126/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180829z?refcode=kme180829z_m&recurring=true") Make no mistake -- they're targeting Kathy for a reason. This investment came shortly after a single-digit poll was released. [**Will you donate to fill our Rapid Response Fund? We are aiming to reach $6,000 by midnight tonight.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279e4/e3b7d3/5dbb3a6c/255534a5/1777038126/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180829z?refcode=kme180829z_m&recurring=true") In a post-_Citizens United_ world, I don't know how many more "bad news" messages I will have to send. But what I do know is that Kathy won't win without your support. Rush in a contribution by using this link: [**www.kathymanning2018.com/outsidespending**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279e4/e3b7d3/5dbb3a6c/255534a5/1777038126/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180829z?refcode=kme180829z_m&recurring=true") Thanks,
Tori Tori Taylor
Campaign Manager
Kathy Manning for Congress
---

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

But Republicans are determined to oust Governor Wolf -- and roll back all his progress.

The election is right around the corner, so Republicans are gearing up to launch some major attacks against us. That's why we need your help to fight back now.
