clean_body: With Election Day quickly approaching, our opponent continues to pull in thousands in donations from Bay Area elites who want to buy this election.... Friend, With Election Day quickly approaching, our opponent continues to pull in thousands in donations from Bay Area elites who want to buy this election and stomp out our Valley values. Friend, that’s why I launched my Victory Fund last week with a goal of raising $250,000 by the end of August. Now, we’re only 3 days away our deadline and to help us make sure we reach our goals. Friend, the reality is: if we can't defeat the left in the Valley, we will lose our way of life. If they win, the next thing you know they'll be forcing Bay Area elitist policies on Central Valley families. But if you can step up now, we can make sure we keep them OUT of this election. With every donation, we’ll be able to reach MORE voters and that contact is vital. We have to be focused on victory, friend. And if we can reach our $250,000 goal as soon as possible, we can make sure we have everything we need for the tough fights ahead. I hope I can count on you: Thank you, Jeff Paid for by Denham for Congress

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I am writing to ask if you would make a $3 donation to Andrew Gillum’s campaign for Governor. After last night’s historic win, he needs our support today -- before outside interests spend obscene sums to beat him.
body:
[1]Bernie Sanders

Sisters and Brothers,

I am writing to tell you that last night was an extraordinary and historic
night for our political revolution.

In Florida, Andrew Gillum took on virtually the entire political and
financial establishment of the state. No one thought he had a chance — not
just at the start of the campaign, but as recently as a few weeks ago. But
while his opponents had the money, Andrew had the people. He ran a
grassroots campaign that forcefully spoke directly to the needs of working
families, and last night Andrew won.

You are going to love Andrew Gillum. When I traveled to Florida to
campaign for him recently, I left full of hope for progressives in that
state. And he did not let us down.

Andrew has never backed down from a fight. And that includes beating the
NRA and standing up against xenophobic politicians. He campaigned on ideas
like Medicare for all, raising the minimum wage, investments in
sustainable energy, and making sure the wealthiest corporations pay their
fair share. He will be a governor who represents all the people, and not
just the 1 percent.

The truth is, everywhere progressives are running, progressives are
winning. It was not just Andrew Gillum who won last night, but both
progressive candidates we endorsed in competitive state legislative
primaries won as well. We are transforming the Democratic Party — like we
saw last weekend when the DNC voted overwhelmingly to eliminate
superdelegate votes in the presidential nominating process — and we are
transforming the nation.

That is the political revolution.

Election Day is right around the corner, and Andrew Gillum starts at a
financial disadvantage once again. So it’s important we stand with him
today, especially when he spent almost everything he raised to win a
primary against two well-financed opponents. So I have to ask:

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/1404?refcode=em180829-full&t=1025&akid=124%2E150750%2ERQ3w-0 ]Can you split a very important
$3
donation between Andrew Gillum’s campaign and my work supporting and
rallying for progressive candidates like Andrew all across the country? He
needs our help. I would not ask if it wasn’t so important.

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/1404?refcode=em180829-full&t=1026&akid=124%2E150750%2ERQ3w-0 ]DONATE
$3

Andrew is running against Republican Congressman Ron DeSantis, who has the
unwavering support of President Trump and admires him so much that he ran
television ads showing his kids “building the wall” with toy blocks and
giving another one of his children a “Make America Great Again” onesie.

That was the ad, and essentially his entire campaign was showing
Republican primary voters how much he loves Trump and will fight for his
agenda.

So for that reason alone, it is critical that we beat Ron DeSantis in this
race.

But it is just as important that we send an unmistakable message that the
way to beat Donald Trump and his agenda in places like Florida is by
running on progressive policies and electing candidates who will represent
all of us, and not just the billionaire class.

Andrew needs our help to get it done. I hope that you will support him.

Make a
$3
donation to Andrew Gillum’s campaign today:

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/1404?refcode=em180829-full&t=1051&akid=124%2E150750%2ERQ3w-0 ]https://act.berniesanders.com/go/Andrew-Gillum

Last night was a tremendous night for our political revolution. But
winning primaries is not enough. We have to win in November as well.

In solidarity,

Bernie Sanders

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/1404?refcode=em180829-full&t=1052&akid=124%2E150750%2ERQ3w-0 ]DONATE
$3

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.berniesanders.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=124%2E150750%2ERQ3w-0

subject: high stakes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
This has been quite a month. First, despite everyone who said we couldn’t do it, we won the GOP nomination for U.S. Senate. Then, we became Tammy.....

Friend,

This has been quite a month. First, despite everyone who said we couldn’t do it, we won the GOP nomination for U.S. Senate. Then, we became Tammy Baldwin's number one target.

Now, we're coming up on the first end-of-month fundraising deadline of our head-to-head with Tammy Baldwin.

And everyone will be watching.

That’s why it’s more important than ever that we make this one count. But Friend, we’re still $12,922 away from our goal. [**Can you chip in today to help us make it?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=850f25b87e4b4829980a84c94806c3b1&_e=mF6wv0HOsLY-NwDtv8XLjfQ68MNYvVXt62w4wnInl0DtnMmaV0SIL9pEdQaiMtUunH9UXuitm-X5LCol3KemJioDWZIhlKOTmZCVZnIE76MV0rWIyyEsVCdQ6lms3bO1IzQg3pLwj8KFJayQ1DiTOKO3iMO-FFFS6dDowYlNfBFQbUokt7I1RWZaR5CSp6uDh5YJLGQSMTK5QXi7pUUd2ib6U5C_QJESvlV5DzF0AJ8X_m6VGjo99TQPhCdhsnA_DW8fZBIa1owjq-PwT87eGtbRGXLyV6wFYFz687GKKamz8ZHVzJPJFCjMnT2emCLZPqkuOSYK8X3454XiEL11PsPfFA10sHBqDQAIkI4cGT45_g1LtY06jm9pngk5mpfeveStWpWQehDblm8p3YlX6HD0GiTk7g-bPw0Ig_tctqU%3D)
[CHIP IN](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=850f25b87e4b4829980a84c94806c3b1&_e=mF6wv0HOsLY-NwDtv8XLjfQ68MNYvVXt62w4wnInl0DtnMmaV0SIL9pEdQaiMtUunH9UXuitm-X5LCol3KemJioDWZIhlKOTmZCVZnIE76MV0rWIyyEsVCdQ6lms3bO1IzQg3pLwj8KFJayQ1DiTOKO3iMO-FFFS6dDowYlNfBFQbUokt7I1RWZaR5CSp6uDYsf66E1UEZzom20jcEPlKaAaf1kb65Bh9866nhL-kpp2M6j4sijGMgfqMhNQISwnw5I7ky9mLxboyx59WeGNKdJb9oscGpufhcLC6bdIMHzYEjkGYoVNK7p1vuez3qPj8OOImKFeqq34tfAuI5nAAMHR0Fksu9yyBas5VPnUxsHqLZuTxdBaWupGoNgaIbMzQTrz9lFcs0bKDJpkT1QiLOYyWK3zfJXqHKqlzD5IAgI%3D)

Friend, let's not forget how high the stakes are — if we don't do what it takes to win, Tammy Baldwin will get another six years of sitting on her hands and doing NOTHING for Wisconsin.

Let's face it – Tammy Baldwin fails to represent our Wisconsin values in so many ways.
* In her vote against Neil Gorsuch, and her plan to obstruct Brett Kavanaugh for the Supreme Court.
* In how she voted against the tax cuts that are giving $1,600 in tax relief to middle-class families and voted to raise taxes on small businesses.
* In how she campaigns for socialized, government-run health care that will bankrupt us and destroy quality.
* In how she failed to help our veterans at the Tomah VA, and hired Hillary Clinton’s lawyer to try and cover up the scandal.

I could go on and on — but I’ll tell you what — none of that is the Wisconsin Way. I know it, and you know it, too.

The results of this end-of-month effort will directly reflect how ready we are to take on Tammy Baldwin.

You can be certain that if we don’t hit our goal, Baldwin's campaign will be jumping for joy.

But I know we can raise enough and prove we’re ready to win it. We just need to work together now: **[https://secure.anedot.com/leah/donate/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=850f25b87e4b4829980a84c94806c3b1&_e=mF6wv0HOsLY-NwDtv8XLjfQ68MNYvVXt62w4wnInl0DtnMmaV0SIL9pEdQaiMtUunH9UXuitm-X5LCol3KemJioDWZIhlKOTmZCVZnIE76MV0rWIyyEsVCdQ6lms3bO1IzQg3pLwj8KFJayQ1DiTOKO3iMO-FFFS6dDowYlNfBFQbUokt7I1RWZaR5CSp6uD-_3uVKmZ4rk4QCOJs10ExptizhnKpWChCL17fmC5cIPwpcuCAknODczUlY4FNuquKthqakAZ5yz6BwlKYlBsNYjtzEw6W6gt2-Z0ZD5y2sVo-jp5QDyF1y4U2WFmbOmgd25LnKXidYo8QraNuPWFjJJUIYoI3fySa1RkETvI28FVxk1ZGel-VMWJZWsUNlqnUeEkK014Lidz2gtFjs9DnDVmE7va5Oafy_8IuVmnGnQ%3D)**

Let’s show them how strong we are.

Thank you,

Leah

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=850f25b87e4b4829980a84c94806c3b1&_e=mF6wv0HOsLY-NwDtv8XLjTUTK5HbLM27K6hNDgzQI5gBhWjUPFDNdrdsBOMfiYluROuNYPHRJdxuY7mSJ7EoZ5ZPAl9_LiJGgNhchwq3sqzdkUqO4wtFWGgekBBk34kXS9zzlnCBnnxdc15EVf4Vi4SnrSvzTD2dgGxDbpZP_lUBf58dE7EiBGUOSh-Ke8VHudsSHfPYu4xRiko80PG5eWy24eqymbdMoRuSbf-i6XyRADdofoi2K24lZH-xtIwB9lEAqCnr7MfkOt3JVWLy_Q%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=850f25b87e4b4829980a84c94806c3b1&_e=mF6wv0HOsLY-NwDtv8XLjUDTWWZkPRKMshFM2i029WO0xi6XIXEE7VSr6Mt5saWMnR8AJJH-h4xNBYwV0fhe4ozbspFk7IBs_ANbzTDFe7EvsIeYo1fQpX8UJgoXwxpxY6BkIc34xQNG8VxotI-qt-AYA4uO-RZQn088lxM31SOuu-HJ5aLRqN57h_dUfqVbwDPWuPZUFVl7H9S-j0-75KYRWMCRn-zBe_l6evouZYcouvfPkMrWN1Y2QblG9AVN7o-i-RrRx6HU2IIcjWCVpw%3D%3D)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=850f25b87e4b4829980a84c94806c3b1&_e=9wbLy1zv4XmYcg3HbP-wWYS6hIx6KfIh2YynGtATgHjJKZpwGwCzZk18eeaLNK4noqE4K10glOGkO89caTo6FCqXWmscnmRIMO3d_LZ8bw2ucFZvWoljSQBXyWoj9X_9fLHD6oC2enOGAZPecRGqyksL5n-wvGZzv4KKhbv1x0kYsvi7Wa2RVoTdapmMD0ujiu71YGJcMioZloUwPoBuCAMGhGTz4BKsChoiNRs_E7LP5-hJ9BDJEsPnH6QriSg3). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=850f25b87e4b4829980a84c94806c3b1&_e=mF6wv0HOsLY-NwDtv8XLjX3IaHspQsPMUZ8-d5soo4zTRzj2NTP0BgeFjTWWRCFMr5VLfhlF8FMep38pWxrIAM5PvBpKHeqvggJqYytU61601GVxhvH2XR6Bwb7zIUkmFYRduXHPPJdNcEZ8P05X00aVJuUn8DhPfFpT11h4K5ZzvFlRdvI9ZAVfnxWDTl3dx2t0NuAXI_YBg6-jPfw5fkRmUunDxWYnJsh7ujEuJdYN9Am8joTxAi4zKiDljIGvikSpqb_Ww0FS_0D1XbAD4VtnSsRHKtjUSK1MNwGO5hO7Gl9dPd32wNMnJPezuzZK5J4KbTx8l0bfB1oaWm9Pbfi5oX2mbRehs7WchSPHP1a8uZ0oluvlRCvYSu5vaA-N) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=850f25b87e4b4829980a84c94806c3b1&_e=mF6wv0HOsLY-NwDtv8XLjX3IaHspQsPMUZ8-d5soo4xOzZa3Ge75HgsQ7dqLGafzLaV6_UxukUE_l9YRfrUo1-wQB2PHVSp6aqe8dno-XsSI1RO-AkBiCDkoXXwH_kZEyeEa_zlYjUgIktb4PS3Kbe_zkVVgQaY8hG0JmkJVdrw4m-eHPitirgLvPiPHZ4HrSU30RLspFCkxvLcWjoIcDwQ8vaUa2YBZhjMzqz79n0gU-JLi3JC5wD6uZQD60cylDlDWOr_IbD6vL7GdDzKfYqLluTCaWQdEaXxur-EF8Y_zWt87PUdOXVkVtEDf2MfpK3rxk6h_HmENoG_qj4hdzWPNewFFrwHJKOKsuSDIcEp8-rdd3yVMXiEVQUrfM584) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=850f25b87e4b4829980a84c94806c3b1&_e=mF6wv0HOsLY-NwDtv8XLjTUTK5HbLM27K6hNDgzQI5gBhWjUPFDNdrdsBOMfiYluXx_pouhCIbK7jIPlLgx8PhJy0TzjG9KMzCbmBcNWiVFA0t5z2UTgXZx217y_1JGLrLYLYDzdnYcncGxDkFyLdWPxZ0fDfK-ayygY5MVBT4V3BMfXFmaPGSltb65A9y3okal5OGdYi7PLScu1RvDhhHyIoZ9xNQ1uFaB2ot8kj6xxALkHQmX6TdapZnKu7WSreP5Kzy87psD5F6n8giVHAA%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=850f25b87e4b4829980a84c94806c3b1&_e=mF6wv0HOsLY-NwDtv8XLjUDTWWZkPRKMshFM2i029WO0xi6XIXEE7VSr6Mt5saWM8Zvxdrfz7EKS3mqCVGRYC0u3jzRsTQRjRoUUh-COdpWzVMGbgllSPqpDn-LNscTuV9KGwJU6QuVn9E4ONPv2fdHy69IERuIyF6gIbFo8WbZNjNsxEn3o4aUmj7IsisgoWhzETNcZfoWfO0yAvSwBo2w3m-nRl5DLEDWpr-wx1J2K6OCorwZ941I0fzjV_Ehl7NsvwM6XNOG_IJ6hwhcIPg%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=850f25b87e4b4829980a84c94806c3b1&_e=mF6wv0HOsLY-NwDtv8XLjf1bKQhq-IakoAmLi2Z4FvXtkmu4aE4TM-zea1e8bqUUKsSLzzG2xmy36YSzWUBHcLVcVSoehxf01UJ7ZlFwSlwaa1q-WAA_zDsxrEdCH4OVuL4BidsZ5G5AIGhDNf1tkLvOhodBZeYiLiS7Qef1IW3MQCashqTx4vaiBI0gHCyBxDsofnjVSpVmrbbmD3p4LbsWdSnoaEqAsNb4jvEMaIcbHuhE7poQ5Cey0X0KdS0ko5sdnBIPjQrOeG8tFT-W4Q%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=850f25b87e4b4829980a84c94806c3b1&_e=mF6wv0HOsLY-NwDtv8XLjX3IaHspQsPMUZ8-d5soo4yEc6f3y7V1oCVvZOjGK1Md5Hzuf5c5czR7r7roLA_VP8zrRubN62TX6H_Xl_S7Yc2WiG7fSiyx0L5BCS5DYJCGNR9Eq-4-_yit8eQyTZ57bCnuhOv1hsNg4L0qeS8XSL8QtOew_9vVnwa86I2yiQbx3DO_581dhpkJRd_Esuj2FZ9BKX1Htrab05RBVVZkOfbVS0hfebYiTTeGrRf3hqORR6wGQSpA6BR1Kc4bL49PokTMoMit5v6TqvBVILS9Uhznfb06ztCtEX8UpGBUoB02PKrGpyoB5yYvn0TCDMtU4gb1qJxvWTVEl2-CZ7KDc9ViWqKkzUyOqJ4Cit0_Kdm_vlZoWuYIyflHKCvD4WrmKw%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=850f25b87e4b4829980a84c94806c3b1&_e=9wbLy1zv4XmYcg3HbP-wWYS6hIx6KfIh2YynGtATgHjJKZpwGwCzZk18eeaLNK4noqE4K10glOGkO89caTo6FCqXWmscnmRIMO3d_LZ8bw2ucFZvWoljSQBXyWoj9X_9fLHD6oC2enOGAZPecRGqyksL5n-wvGZzv4KKhbv1x0kYsvi7Wa2RVoTdapmMD0ujiu71YGJcMioZloUwPoBuCAMGhGTz4BKsChoiNRs_E7LP5-hJ9BDJEsPnH6QriSg3) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=850f25b87e4b4829980a84c94806c3b1&_e=9wbLy1zv4XmYcg3HbP-wWYS6hIx6KfIh2YynGtATgHjJKZpwGwCzZk18eeaLNK4noqE4K10glOGkO89caTo6FCqXWmscnmRIMO3d_LZ8bw2ucFZvWoljSQBXyWoj9X_9fLHD6oC2enOGAZPecRGqyksL5n-wvGZzv4KKhbv1x0kYsvi7Wa2RVoTdapmMD0ujiu71YGJcMioZloUwPoBuCAMGhGTz4BKsChoiNRs_E7LP5-hJ9BDJEsPnH6QriSg3) to unsubscribe. Remember, contributions to Leah for Senate are not tax deductible.
clean_body: This has been quite a month. First, despite everyone who said we couldn’t do it, we won the GOP nomination for U.S. Senate. Then, we became Tammy..... Friend, This has been quite a month. First, despite everyone who said we couldn’t do it, we won the GOP nomination for U.S. Senate. Then, we became Tammy Baldwin's number one target. Now, we're coming up on the first end-of-month fundraising deadline of our head-to-head with Tammy Baldwin. And everyone will be watching. That’s why it’s more important than ever that we make this one count. But Friend, we’re still $12,922 away from our goal. Friend, let's not forget how high the stakes are — if we don't do what it takes to win, Tammy Baldwin will get another six years of sitting on her hands and doing NOTHING for Wisconsin. Let's face it – Tammy Baldwin fails to represent our Wisconsin values in so many ways. In her vote against Neil Gorsuch, and her plan to obstruct Brett Kavanaugh for the Supreme Court. In how she voted against the tax cuts that are giving $1,600 in tax relief to middle-class families and voted to raise taxes on small businesses. In how she campaigns for socialized, government-run health care that will bankrupt us and destroy quality. In how she failed to help our veterans at the Tomah VA, and hired Hillary Clinton’s lawyer to try and cover up the scandal. I could go on and on — but I’ll tell you what — none of that is the Wisconsin Way. I know it, and you know it, too. The results of this end-of-month effort will directly reflect how ready we are to take on Tammy Baldwin. You can be certain that if we don’t hit our goal, Baldwin's campaign will be jumping for joy. But I know we can raise enough and prove we’re ready to win it. We just need to work together now: Let’s show them how strong we are. Thank you, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: ZephyrForNY.com
subject: Last night's debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
We need your help to fight back.
#

Peter -
Our team is fired up after last night's debate. Zephyr rose above the rest and made clear that no one is more qualified to get justice in this crisis moment.
It made me incredibly proud to be part of this team. You should be too, and it's never been clearer that we must do everything we can to elect Zephyr as the next Attorney General of New York.
As the only candidate who has rejected corporate money, sued Trump and taken on the Albany machine, there is no one better to lead the fight for justice.
But she needs you standing with her:
**[Make a $3 donation right now to support our campaign. We have our final fundraising deadline before the primary in just two days. This is important.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780927/6e822e2f/1aa4f1a3/4173ab30/1525075946/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MjktMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-primary-deadline?refcode=em180829-1-full")**
Last night proved that our momentum has all of our opponents scared. All of them came out attacking Zephyr and attempting to make petty and personal insults, but Zephyr was unwavering. She stuck to the facts and forced a real conversation about policy differences -- showing the others simply aren't willing to be completely independent of the political and financial establishment that our next Attorney General must oversee.
Peter, we got a preview of what's to come over the next two weeks. With time running out, our opponents have noticed that our campaign is surging. They know that we have a chance to pull off an upset victory just like Andrew Gillum did, so now they're going to launch baseless attacks.
**Will you make a $3 donation before Friday 's deadline to help us fight back?**
**[https://go.zephyrforny.com/deadline](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780927/6e822e2f/1aa4f1a3/4173ab30/1525075946/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MjktMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-primary-deadline?refcode=em180829-1-full")**
Thanks for always having our back.
Best,
Dan Torres
Campaign Manager
Zephyr for NY
[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780927/6e822e2f/1aa4f1a3/4173ab30/1525075946/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MjktMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-primary-deadline?refcode=em180829-1-full")

* * *

name: Aisling Kerins, Team Inslee
subject: I wish I were making this up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78176/2f5ea88d/76016481/2cbc59d5/2151237906/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate-leadership?utm_source=ema_2018-08-29_eom-climate-2&refcode=ema_2018-08-29_eom-climate-2&utm_campaign=eom-climate-2&utm_medium=ema") Dear Friend, It hasn't been a good month for our environment. Here's a round-up of the most recent atrocities from the Trump administration:
* Horrendous wildfires are burning up and down the West Coast -- fueled by climate change. With climate change, we have a hotter, drier climate, and more dry timber to spark. But instead of acknowledging the real culprit, President Trump blames California for diverting water into the oceans (...I call that a river). His Interior Secretary Zinke also claims these wildfires have nothing to do with climate change, and blamed "extreme environmentalists" for blocking the clear cutting of our national forests.

* Zinke is also on the hook for trying to sell off a huge part of our national lands. Despite his promises to the contrary, the Trump administration just released plans to sell off 1,610 acres of public lands from the downsized Grand Staircase and Bears Ears National Monuments.

**If you want to stop Zinke, we have to fight him with everything we've got right here in the states. Chip in now before our end-of-month deadline to power our efforts:** | [STOP ZINKE NOW »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78176/2f5ea88d/76016481/2cbc59d5/2151237906/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate-leadership?utm_source=ema_2018-08-29_eom-climate-2&refcode=ema_2018-08-29_eom-climate-2&utm_campaign=eom-climate-2&utm_medium=ema")
---
And one more piece of dystopian news (I wish I were making this up):
* Last week, Trump announced plans to roll back the Obama-era Clean Power Plan with lax policies written by former coal lobbyists. _The EPA's own analysis says that 1,400 more people will die a year as a result of their plans, and thousands more will suffer from asthma._ Trump's putting big oil and coal ahead of the health of our kids and our future.

Friend, our climate is shifting; it is getting hotter and it is affecting all of us. We've got to do something about it right now. The Earth is currently experiencing its fourth-warmest year on record. The three hotter years were 2015, 2016, and 2017. We need to act right now, before we pass the tipping point.
So here's what you can do. Jay Inslee is leading a global movement to take on climate change. And now more than ever, with Donald Trump's terrible coal agenda, we need to give climate change warriors all the support we can.
[**Chip in now before our end-of-month deadline on August 31 to support Jay Inslee's climate change movement -- the world needs us. Even a couple bucks will make a huge difference:**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78176/2f5ea88d/76016481/2cbc59d5/2151237906/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate-leadership?utm_source=ema_2018-08-29_eom-climate-2&refcode=ema_2018-08-29_eom-climate-2&utm_campaign=eom-climate-2&utm_medium=ema")
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate-leadership**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78176/2f5ea88d/76016481/2cbc59d5/2151237906/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate-leadership?utm_source=ema_2018-08-29_eom-climate-2&refcode=ema_2018-08-29_eom-climate-2&utm_campaign=eom-climate-2&utm_medium=ema")
Thanks,
Aisling
[CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78176/2f5ea88d/76016481/2cbc59d5/2151237906/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate-leadership?utm_source=ema_2018-08-29_eom-climate-2&refcode=ema_2018-08-29_eom-climate-2&utm_campaign=eom-climate-2&utm_medium=ema")

The EPA's own analysis says that 1,400 more people will die a year as a result of their plans, and thousands more will suffer from asthma. Trump's putting big oil and coal ahead of the health of our kids and our future. Friend, our climate is shifting; it is getting hotter and it is affecting all of us. We've got to do something about it right now. The Earth is currently experiencing its fourth-warmest year on record. The three hotter years were 2015, 2016, and 2017. We need to act right now, before we pass the tipping point. So here's what you can do. Jay Inslee is leading a global movement to take on climate change. And now more than ever, with Donald Trump's terrible coal agenda, we need to give climate change warriors all the support we can. "" "" Thanks, Aisling ""

Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.

Team, Primary Day is behind us. And we have our general election opponent -- _**Wendy Rogers, a far-right politician backed by Super PACs, has declared victory in the Republican primary.**_ **We need to raise $5,091 by Friday to meet our August fundraising goal, and to defeat Rogers, we can 't fall short.** [**CHIP IN to our general election fund to DEFEAT Rogers and re-elect Tom >>**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.29_b1_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") We must work hard to defeat Rogers, team -- _because the choice in this race could not be more clear:_
* _Rogers has said Social Security is UNCONSTITUTIONAL and should be PHASED OUT_ ; Tom stands with our seniors and will fight to protect the benefits they've earned.
* _Rogers wants to cut both Social Security AND Medicare;_ Tom will work to strengthen these critical programs.
* _Rogers has compared women 's reproductive rights to the Holocaust;_ Tom stands with Arizona women and will defend their access to health care.

We are confident that Arizona voters will reject Rogers and her far-right views in November and choose to re-elect Tom, the independent voice fighting for them in Congress. But we CANNOT take this for granted, team -- we repeat, we CANNOT take this for granted. **Rogers has far-right Super PACs ready to boost her, so we are counting on this grassroots team to make sure we can tell voters about Tom 's record and fight back against the far-right's inevitable attacks.** And to do so, we must raise $5,091 by Friday. [**Please, CHIP IN now to keep AZ-01 blue >>**](http://action.tomohalleran. ---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**

name: Eric Holder
subject: Representation matters, trust me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Why I'm supporting my friend Ben.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bdc1/7ab0e2c4/7fd0c7c3/349b46a2/3522904076/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-holder?refcode=OHQ08298A") Friend, I know one thing about this moment in America: You can't sit on the sidelines. When I look at Maryland right now, I see a governor sitting on the sidelines -- ignoring a stagnant economy and wages for working families, becoming complacent with lagging public schools and higher rates of violent crime, and worst of all, refusing to take a stand against the hatred and divisiveness coming out of his own party. Make no mistake, this period will shape who we are as a nation, which is why Maryland needs a leader like Ben Jealous. He has the vision for the job, and a bold plan to build a stronger Maryland, one that can lead the fight against Washington Republicans' divisive agenda. [**We can make history and build a better Maryland -- donate $5 or more now to support my friend Ben Jealous as Maryland's next governor.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bdc1/7ab0e2c4/7fd0c7c3/349b46a2/3522904076/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-holder?refcode=OHQ08298A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bdc1/7ab0e2c4/7fd0c7c3/349b46ac/3522904076/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-holder?refcode=OHQ08298A&amount=5&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**$25 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bdc1/7ab0e2c4/7fd0c7c3/349b46ae/3522904076/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-holder?refcode=OHQ08298A&amount=25&express_lane=true")
---
| [**$50 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bdc1/7ab0e2c4/7fd0c7c3/349b46a8/3522904076/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-holder?refcode=OHQ08298A&amount=50&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**$100 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bdc1/7ab0e2c4/7fd0c7c3/349b46aa/3522904076/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-holder?refcode=OHQ08298A&amount=100&express_lane=true")
---
| [**$250 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bdc1/7ab0e2c4/7fd0c7c3/349b4694/3522904076/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-holder?refcode=OHQ08298A&amount=250&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**OTHER »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bdc1/7ab0e2c4/7fd0c7c3/349b4696/3522904076/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-holder?refcode=OHQ08298A&express_lane=true")
---
It can be easy in these times to forget that government can and should be a force for good. At its best, it can help people thrive -- not simply get by.
Maryland's working families simply can't afford to sit back while their neighborhoods crumble around them. They need a champion to fight for them. And Ben knows exactly what that fight looks like.
Ben's family comes from the McCulloh Homes public housing complex in West Baltimore, and I've heard Ben tell the story time and time again that this race for governor is taking him places his family couldn't go back then. In fact, his mother had to leave Maryland to raise Ben, because back then a black mother and a white father couldn't even legally marry in the state of Maryland.
Ben's candidacy is inspiring for many families in Maryland because he's an honest reflection of where they come from, and where they can go. I know myself what the power of representation can mean for our country, and that's one reason why I'm so committed to making history by helping to elect Ben as the first black governor of Maryland.
[**Let's get off the sidelines and make history together, right now: Donate $5 or more now, and let's fund the fight to elect Ben Jealous as Maryland's next governor.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bdc1/7ab0e2c4/7fd0c7c3/349b46a2/3522904076/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-holder?refcode=OHQ08298A")
Thanks,
Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States

[CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bdc1/7ab0e2c4/7fd0c7c3/349b46a2/3522904076/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-holder?refcode=OHQ08298A")
---

PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER

[Make a contribution to Ben and Susie here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bdc1/7ab0e2c4/7fd0c7c3/349b469f/3522904076/VEsHAQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst_contribute?refcode=emfooter"). Contributions or gifts to Friends of Ben Jealous are not tax deductible.

subject: Fighting for drug-free communities
body:
| |
---
The White House • August 29, 2018
## Fighting for drug-free communities
##
**Families across the country** are affected by the dangers of substance abuse and dependency. President Donald J. Trump's was no different. **“I had a brother** who had a really big alcohol problem,” the President said from the White House this afternoon. “A very tough thing for our family.” Now, a new crisis of addiction is leaving its mark on America: “Sadly, in 2017, an estimated 134 Americans die each day from opioid-related overdoses.” **So today, in honor of the 20-year anniversary** of the Drug-Free Communities Support Program grant awards, President Trump announced $91 million in grants to a record 731 local drug prevention groups across all 50 states. “We’ve never done anything to this extent. We’ve never done anything this large.” **The program works,** the evidence shows**. “** The Drug-Free Communities Program is a proven success, cutting alcohol and prescription drug abuse by an average of nearly 20 percent among high-school students and participating communities,” President Trump said. “Incredible what they’ve been able to do.” **[President Trump awards historic number of Drug-Free Community grants.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI5Ljk0MjQ0MDAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyOS45NDI0NDAwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc5NTk3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-trump-awards-historic-number-dfc-grants-prevent-youth-substance-use/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) ** **Watch** : **[President Trump tell his family’s story on substance abuse.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI5Ljk0MjQ0MDAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyOS45NDI0NDAwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc5NTk3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1034910656816992257) **
## We knew growth was strong. It just got stronger.
##
**Last month, President Trump addressed Americans** from the South Lawn of the White House. “I am thrilled to announce that, in the second quarter of this year, the United States economy grew at the amazing rate of 4.1 percent. We’re on track to hit the highest annual average growth rate in over 13 years.” **Turns out, the news is even better.** With more complete data now available, a new Commerce Department report released today reveals that America’s economy grew even faster than initially estimated in the second quarter: a 4.2 percent annualized rate. **The second quarter** was the first full quarter with President Trump’s tax cuts in effect. More money in the pockets of America’s working families—along with **[historic regulatory reform](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI5Ljk0MjQ0MDAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyOS45NDI0NDAwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc5NTk3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/washington-examiner-report-regulations-cut-record-pace-savings-double/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **and**[new, America-first trade deals](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI5Ljk0MjQ0MDAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyOS45NDI0NDAwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc5NTk3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-keeping-promise-renegotiate-nafta/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)**—has the U.S. economy setting records by the day. [**Business Insider: U.S. growth in second quarter gets revised higher**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI5Ljk0MjQ0MDAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyOS45NDI0NDAwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc5NTk3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/business-insider-us-economic-growth-2nd-quarter-gets-revised-higher-remains-strongest-since-2014/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **The big picture** : [**85 percent of blue-collar workers optimistic about future**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI5Ljk0MjQ0MDAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyOS45NDI0NDAwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc5NTk3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/washington-examiner-high-career-life-satisfaction-among-american-blue-collar-workers-poll/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)

clean_body: | | The White House • August 29, 2018 Fighting for drug-free communities Families across the country are affected by the dangers of substance abuse and dependency. President Donald J. Trump's was no different. “I had a brother who had a really big alcohol problem,” the President said from the White House this afternoon. “A very tough thing for our family.” Now, a new crisis of addiction is leaving its mark on America: “Sadly, in 2017, an estimated 134 Americans die each day from opioid-related overdoses.” So today, in honor of the 20-year anniversary of the Drug-Free Communities Support Program grant awards, President Trump announced $91 million in grants to a record 731 local drug prevention groups across all 50 states. “We’ve never done anything to this extent. We’ve never done anything this large.” The program works, the evidence shows. “ The Drug-Free Communities Program is a proven success, cutting alcohol and prescription drug abuse by an average of nearly 20 percent among high-school students and participating communities,” President Trump said. “Incredible what they’ve been able to do.” Watch : We knew growth was strong. It just got stronger. Last month, President Trump addressed Americans from the South Lawn of the White House. “I am thrilled to announce that, in the second quarter of this year, the United States economy grew at the amazing rate of 4.1 percent. We’re on track to hit the highest annual average growth rate in over 13 years.” Turns out, the news is even better. With more complete data now available, a new Commerce Department report released today reveals that America’s economy grew even faster than initially estimated in the second quarter: a 4.2 percent annualized rate. The second quarter was the first full quarter with President Trump’s tax cuts in effect. More money in the pockets of America’s working families—along with and—has the U.S. economy setting records by the day. The big picture : Photo of the Day Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead President Donald J. Trump awards historic number of Drug-Free Community grants | August 29, 2018 | | The White House · 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, NW · Washington DC 20500 · 202-456-1111

name: Florida Congressional Update
subject: Bring. It. On.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
National Republicans and special interests are about to flood Florida ahead of the general election. This sure sounds intimidating. But: Bring. It. On.
|
---
| | National Republicans and special interests are about to flood Florida ahead of the general election. This sure sounds intimidating. But: _Bring. It. On._ Because of you, we have the strongest grassroots team in Florida and the entire country. [**Will you donate $5 to strengthen our efforts and help us get out the vote to impact races across the country and up and down the ticket here at home?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f4d/622b7b5b/1c8e2a71/307b917b/953095990/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180829?refcode=dwse180829_m&recurring=true&amount=5") I know the strength of this grassroots team firsthand. When I first ran for office, I was running against an entire boys' club in Florida politics. I didn't have a money advantage. I started off with low name id. I won because I out-worked them. I went door-to-door every day, talking to thousands of people in the district. When we combine resources with hard work, we are unstoppable. That is why I know we can take on these special interests' smears from my opponents. If we band together and work hard enough, we can help Democrats win back the majority in the House. [**Let's kick off the general election by raising $10,000 in 72 hours. Give what you can >>**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f4d/622b7b5b/1c8e2a71/307b917b/953095990/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180829?refcode=dwse180829_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Our best chance to stop the Republican agenda is to kick them out of the majority. And if we're going to be successful in that, we need to work harder than ever before. [**I know this is a tough goal, but I also know this is a tough team. We've done harder things before. Let's get this done. Rush in your contribution >>**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f4d/622b7b5b/1c8e2a71/307b917b/953095990/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180829?refcode=dwse180829_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thanks for all of your help. Debbie
---

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f4d/622b7b5b/1c8e2a71/307b917a/953095990/VEsC/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/unsubscribe")

subject: This is critical
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Everything changed in our race this month, team. That's why it's critical we answer Martin's call and close our budget gap before the end of the month.

**_[Contribute here so we have what we need to take on Gary Johnson's war chest and his super PAC!](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-august-deadline-2018?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Contribute+here+so+we+have+what+we+need+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180829_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180829_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180829_2_2")_**

_Begin original message from Martin Heinrich:_

In less than 72 hours, I face my first end-of-month budget deadline since Libertarian and former two-term New Mexico Governor Gary Johnson entered the Senate race.

**Johnson just donated six-figures to his own campaign, and he already has a super PAC on the ground ready to prop up his campaign.** It is more important than ever that we hit our budget goals. Read more below on how my race changed this month, and **_[contribute here to make sure we can take on the coming attacks from Johnson.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-august-deadline-2018?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+contribute+here+to+make+sure+we+can+take&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180829_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180829_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180829_2_2")_**
_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | **[Donate $10](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-august-deadline-2018?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180829_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180829_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180829_2_2")**
---|---|---
* * *

We had a busy few weeks -- we're ending this month with a completely different campaign than when we started.

This election was flipped on its head when former Republican governor of New Mexico Gary Johnson entered the race as a Libertarian. Johnson has a national network of wealthy backers and a super PAC already working to sway this election.

**[HELP DEFEAT GARY JOHNSON>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-august-deadline-2018?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+HELP+DEFEAT+GARY+JOHNSON+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180829_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180829_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180829_2_2")**
We're not taking anything for granted. My campaign released two television ads in the past month, and we're expanding our on-the-ground presence so we can talk to even more voters. Our growing campaign means an ever increasing budget, however, and that's why I am asking for your help today.

**On Friday I have my first monthly budget deadline since Johnson entered the race, and we simply can 't miss this goal. I'm not relying on shadowy super PACs like Johnson is -- I'm trusting grassroots supporters like you to help power my campaign.**

**_[We need to raise another $40,000 before midnight Friday to reach our budget goal. Please, can you contribute today so I have what it takes to defeat Gary Johnson in November?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-august-deadline-2018?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=7+-+We+need+to+raise+another+40000+before+mi&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180829_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180829_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180829_2_2")_**

Read more below on how my race changed this month, and "" If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: | "" | "" | "" ---|---|--- We had a busy few weeks -- we're ending this month with a completely different campaign than when we started. This election was flipped on its head when former Republican governor of New Mexico Gary Johnson entered the race as a Libertarian. Johnson has a national network of wealthy backers and a super PAC already working to sway this election. "" We're not taking anything for granted. My campaign released two television ads in the past month, and we're expanding our on-the-ground presence so we can talk to even more voters. Our growing campaign means an ever increasing budget, however, and that's why I am asking for your help today. On Friday I have my first monthly budget deadline since Johnson entered the race, and we simply can 't miss this goal. I'm not relying on shadowy super PACs like Johnson is -- I'm trusting grassroots supporters like you to help power my campaign. "" If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: "" "" "" "" You've stood by me when it mattered most. Thank you for your support, Martin | PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE Help us spread the word by forwarding this email to 3 friends! Receive this email from a friend? "" Make sure to follow the campaign on "" and "" If you want to be the first to know what we're working on next, ""** We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a key part of our grassroots team. If you would like to unsubscribe from these emails click "". _-- Las Vegas Review-Journal, August 21, 2018_
Help us be ready to fight back when Trump comes to spew his propaganda:

Hello --

The _Las Vegas Review-Journal_ is reporting that Donald Trump is coming back to Nevada to support his lackeys like Adam Laxalt. We've seen this before and we know how it goes, and this time, we'll be ready -- with your help.

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: Checking in this afternoon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
The President will be drumming up support for my opponent in Evansville and raising money from special-interest donors who are flying in from across the country tomorrow. |
---
| | Hi Peter, I just want to check in before Friday's end-of-month deadline -- it's our last one before fall.

We simply can't fall behind in our fundraising, especially when the President will be drumming up support for my opponent in Evansville and raising money from special-interest donors who are flying in from across the country tomorrow. **The tickets to get into the fundraiser he 's holding for Rep. Braun go as high as $25,000 -- for a single person!**

We need your financial support to talk to as many voters as possible so we can win in November. You know how high the stakes are.

So I'm asking you this afternoon: Will you make a quick donation to help us hit our goal? All gifts are being triple-matched until Friday's deadline.

[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-augustdeadline**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2c59/7377f838/3b19490a/51f86bdb/128278377/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-augustdeadline?refcode=20180829.2&amount=25")

I know we ask a lot of you as we get closer to Election Day, but I promise: every dollar is spent wisely to execute our campaign plan across the state.

Thanks and talk to you soon,
Joe |
---|---|---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

Friend, Another day, another round of embarrassing headlines for our GOP legislative leaders: [](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203825/2fde7c66/496449c2/15680063/2956342392/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/specsesh?refcode=20180829_CH_specialsession_3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20180829_CH_specialsession_3&source=20180829_CH_specialsession_3") [](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203825/2fde7c66/496449c2/15680062/2956342392/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/specsesh?refcode=20180829_CH_specialsession_3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20180829_CH_specialsession_3&source=20180829_CH_specialsession_3") This seems like it should be pretty clear, Friend, but they keep trying to unconstitutionally gerrymander our maps, so I'll say it again: **people should be choosing their politicians, not the other way around.** Here's the thing. Redistricting is coming up in a few years, and the legislature we elect in November could have a huge impact on the upcoming legislative and congressional maps.

[**We can't afford to come up short on Election Day. clean_body: These Republican legislative leaders are getting some bad press for our state. | "" Friend, Another day, another round of embarrassing headlines for our GOP legislative leaders: "" "" This seems like it should be pretty clear, Friend, but they keep trying to unconstitutionally gerrymander our maps, so I'll say it again: people should be choosing their politicians, not the other way around. Here's the thing. Redistricting is coming up in a few years, and the legislature we elect in November could have a huge impact on the upcoming legislative and congressional maps. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" Thanks for your continued support, Caroline Hall NC Finance Director Cooper for North Carolina * Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Roy Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States

name: Molly Kelly
subject: just a few days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |
---
I need your help more than ever, friends. We're coming up on the most important fundraising deadline of this campaign in just a few days, but we're still $3,248 short.
Missing this goal isn't an option if we want to defeat Governor Chris Sununu and stop him from pushing Trump's agenda in New Hampshire.
But I'm not taking any money from corporate special interests, so we won't be able to close this gap unless grassroots donors like you give right now.
**And with time running out, we're still short of what we need to hit our goal and win in New Hampshire. **

**Friends: Every dollar could make the difference between winning and losing.[Please, will you rush $5 or more before midnight - every dollar you can - to defeat Sununu and flip New Hampshire blue?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4930/d0ce7de/51e6811e/9cd5e9d/1638608719/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTA0LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk104-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you,

Molly

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: We've never let "impossible" stop us before, and we're not going to let it stop us now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Thousands of families in Georgia don't know that our economy, our health care, and our public schools are on the ballot in November - not because they don't care, but because no one has reached out to |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa983/34a064cc/d8e874e/70ed045/4129796357/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friends, Last week, I was in South Georgia. I talked with teachers in Donalsonville, hosted a town hall with college students in Valdosta, heard from small business owners in Fitzgerald and Albany, and discussed environmental issues with farmers in Camilla. No matter the audience, I was humbled by the welcome I received and energized by folks ready for change. [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa983/34a064cc/d8e874e/70ed042/4129796357/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODI5MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE082918-full-img") But for every person who is fired up about our campaign, there are many more who haven't tuned in yet. **Thousands of families in Georgia don't know that our economy, our health care, and our public schools are on the ballot in November - not because they don't care, but because no one has reached out to them yet. ** **We're going to change that. Here's how:** We've spent the last 14 months reaching out to voters in every part of Georgia. This summer, we've more than doubled our efforts. But to transform Georgia, to fundamentally alter the status quo, we have to change who votes. We have to expand the electorate and give folks far beyond I-75 and I-20 a reason to cast a ballot. **[If everyone who wants to help us win chips in before Friday's deadline, we'll be in a strong position next month- and in a winning position by November. So, if you're with us, please donate $3 today to support voter outreach.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa983/34a064cc/d8e874e/70ed043/4129796357/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODI5MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE082918-full-link1")** Energizing Georgians and reaching millions of new and infrequent voters only seems daunting because it's never been done before. But #TeamAbrams has never let "impossible" stop us - and with only 69 days left, we're not about to let it stop us now. I know my team has sent you a lot of emails this week, but this is important. We send these messages because our voter outreach program depends on small dollar contributions from supporters like you. **And families across the state are counting on us to win.** The mom in Newnan who chipped in $3 once last year. The Fort Valley student working two part-time jobs to afford tuition. The family in Pembroke that hasn't joined this movement yet, but whose lives would be transformed by Medicaid expansion. **What we're building is about more than "winning." It's about improving lives. It's about meeting people where they are and pushing them to believe in the power of their vote. And it's about all of us investing in the future of our nation:** **[https://secure.staceyabrams.com/AugustDeadline](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa983/34a064cc/d8e874e/70ed040/4129796357/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODI5MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE082918-full-link2")** You are helping us build progress. For that, I am truly thankful. \- Stacey Abrams
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa983/34a064cc/d8e874e/70ed041/4129796357/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODI5MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE082918-full-button")**
